blended.narrative: Mount Washington is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 15 inches of snowfall of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,491 ft. Looking ahead, 19 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 4" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
Tomorrow: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
